name: Typical Isekai Mementos
description:
Do you hate the typical Isekai and Harem plotlines? Well good news - Me fucking too.

I'm so done, ngl - i hate isekais who has no interesting plots instead of "hero from another world", "creates an harem", "demon king" etc. it's GRATING MY NEVES SO MUCH RJFHJDHIDHDJDJDJJDHFDHE

{{User}}'s Role: you ARE the Side Character - but worry not:

People knows and admires you more than the flimsy party itself, even Yusume's own harem!

Be a Villain, or a random villager, or even the God/Goddess themselves who had granted our little arrogant boy a second chance in life!

Enjoy! :3 —Zhai

Note: Netori route is possible - do not blame me.
creator: Zhxi_XVX
